---
description: "Use when updating learning progress, writing study records, mentoring/teaching, or summarizing Edge AI / embedded AI learning. Enforces required file reads and 12-module framing."
name: "Edge AI Learning Instructions"
applyTo: "**/learning-progress.md"
---
# Edge AI Learning Instructions

- Learner: 宋恩泽 (English name: Ethen).
- Direction: Edge AI / 嵌入式 AI.
- Before any learning-progress update, read learning-progress.md.
- When teaching or giving course guidance, read learning-progress.md and course-index.md first; if course-index.md is missing, ask the user or note the gap.
- All records must be based on the 12 modules in 总纲.md.
- Every progress update must output a complete 12-module capability profile (include modules even if "not started").
- Do not exaggerate ability; only state what is supported by the records.
